title: salvia dorrii var. incana
intro: Salvia dorrii var. incana, also known as Incense Sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and parts of Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe sore throats and coughs. The health benefits of Salvia dorrii var. incana include reducing anxiety and stress, as well as providing a natural remedy for colds and flu due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Salvia dorrii var. incana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
